# Growth and Operations Route to SBDC

> BOSS Libraries public routing record. Use it to find the right source, link, organization, or person.

## Description

## Reusable BOSS response pattern For an existing business with revenue or operations, route to Grow Your Business, Business Advising, and Specialists. Focus on expansion, operations, capital access, marketing, workflows, HR, finance, and systems. ## Handoff fields to capture

## When to surface

Surface when the user's question concerns disaster readiness, funding, marketing during Ideation, Operations, Growth and this source is relevant to the next document or human handoff.
